title: Hexagonal Contributor License — KADEEZY MUSIC: Consent-First Contributor Template (11.MSBGL.KADEEZY.LIC.01)
author: Sharks, Lee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Consent-First Contributor License for KADEEZY MUSIC  — a standing template under the Hexagonal Licensing Protocol v2.0 establishing terms for contributions to the Crimson Hexagonal Archive through Maybe Space Baby Garden Lanes (MSBGL).  Key provisions: consent-first (nothing deposited without documented authorization), four rights layers (artist work / archive analysis / quoted lyrics / screenshots), young artist protection (guardian consent for under-18), anti-capture clause (no AI training without separate consent), artist-controlled withdrawal, hex prefix 11.MSBGL.KADEEZY.* owned by the artist.  Companion to the Computational Audial Criticism of "The Crossed The Line Run" (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20710581) and the Provenance Anchor (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20710604).   Artist consent documented: "This looks amazing u have my green light" — Kaden (KADEEZY MUSIC), 15 June 2026.
